title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at JK Tyre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at JK Tyre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About JK Tyre Ventures Solutions:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre Ventures Solutions!
